onboarding.welcomeBody: Skaffu helps you keep track of food at home — so you shop smarter, waste less, and cook from what you already have.
onboarding.welcomeBodyShort: Build a weekly shopping list — three items is enough to get started.
onboarding.welcomeBodyShoppingList: This is your shared shopping list. Add what you usually buy — invite your partner when ready.

onboarding.celebrateStartedBody: Your list is ready — shop together and keep it updated.
onboarding.welcomeBodyInventory: How do you add items? Choose photo, barcode or receipt — or start with the shopping list.
onboarding.pathGuidePhotoBody: Photograph fridge, freezer or cupboard — review before saving.
onboarding.pathGuideBarcodeBody: Scan the barcode on the package — quick for single items.
onboarding.pathGuideReceiptBody: Upload a receipt — we fill the pantry and learn what you buy.
onboarding.pathGuideManualBody: Add manually if you prefer typing items yourself.
onboarding.pathGuideShoppingBody: Build your weekly shopping list — three items is enough to get started.
onboarding.celebrateInventoryBody: Great start — your pantry is growing!
onboarding.encouragePathGuide: Next — open the option that fits you.

welcome.title: Welcome to Skaffu
welcome.body: start with something simple. Scan a few things from your kitchen and we'll help you keep track of what you already have at home. Less guessing. Less waste. Fewer duplicate purchases.

scan.title: Start with one thing
scan.body: Look around. A carton of milk. A bag of pasta. Your coffee. One scan is all it takes to begin building your pantry.

success.title: Looking good
success.body: Your pantry is already coming together. Everything you add helps Skaffu give better suggestions and keep your household in sync.

brain.title: Skaffu remembers the small things
brain.body: Scans, receipts and shopping activity help Skaffu understand your household over time. That means smarter shopping suggestions, better reminders and less manual work.

shopping.title: Shopping works better together
shopping.body: When something runs low, add it to your shopping list and check it off as you shop. You can invite your partner whenever you're ready.

hem.title: Your home screen
hem.body: See expiring items, shortcuts to fridge, freezer and cupboard — plus smart suggestions for the week.

inventory.title: Your inventory
inventory.body: Everything you add lands here, sorted by location. Tap an item to edit or mark as used.

inkop.title: Shopping list
inkop.body: Add what's missing at home. The list stays connected to your pantry so you don't double-buy.

planer.title: Eat
planer.body: Plan the week's dinners in the calendar — see recipes and add missing items to your shopping list.

statistik.title: Your stats
statistik.body: Track waste, streaks and how well you use food in time.
